rows.label: qev091304_MSG0001
rows.name:
This one's pulled out of the
ground just like the others.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091304_JNK0010
rows.name: Speculate

rows.label: qev091304_SEL0011
rows.name:
Say that something is obviously
digging the data probes up.

rows.label: qev091304_JNK0020
rows.name: Correct

rows.label: qev091304_SEL0021
rows.name:
Remind Fog Christoph that you have
already checked this location.

rows.label: qev091304_MSG0002
rows.name: Right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091304_MSG0003
rows.name: ...Wait. Haven't we been here already?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091304_MSG0004
rows.name: Huh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091304_MSG0005
rows.name:
Huh. You're right. This
IS where we started.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091304_MSG0006
rows.name: Apologies. That's my mistake.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091304_MSG0007
rows.name:
My brother was always
yelling at me to focus.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091304_MSG0007_02
rows.name:
He used to say the only mistakes
I made were stupid ones.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091304_MSG0008
rows.name:
Guess I haven't made much
progress on that front.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091304_JNK0030
rows.name: Comfort

rows.label: qev091304_SEL0031
rows.name:
Remind Fog Christoph
that no one is perfect.

rows.label: qev091304_JNK0040
rows.name: Scold

rows.label: qev091304_SEL0041
rows.name:
Yell at Fog Christoph to
get his act together.

rows.label: qev091304_JNK0050
rows.name: Counsel

rows.label: qev091304_SEL0051
rows.name:
Tell Fog Christoph that all progress
is built on such mistakes.

rows.label: qev091304_MSG0009
rows.name:
Oh, uh, thanks. I
appreciate your patience.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091304_MSG0010
rows.name: I promise it won't happen again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091304_MSG0011
rows.name:
You're right, of course. One mistake out
here could put our lives in danger.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091304_MSG0012
rows.name: You're very kind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091304_MSG0013
rows.name:
I'll add this to the list of
mistakes I mull over in my
head before going to sleep.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091304_MSG0014
rows.name: ...Okay.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091304_MSG0015
rows.name:
Well, there's nothing else for us here.
Let's head to our actual destination.[ST:wait ]
